name: Build and Update Latest Release

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write

env:
  APP_NAME: ChatP2P
  MAIN_CLASS: com.fernandev.chatp2p.Main
  JAVA_VERSION: '21'
  JAR_FILE: ChatP2P-jar-with-dependencies.jar
  RELEASE_TAG: latest-main

jobs:
  build-linux:
    name: Build Linux installers
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v5
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ env.JAVA_VERSION }}
          cache: maven

      - name: Install Linux packaging tools
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y fakeroot rpm

      - name: Build JAR
        run: mvn -B clean package

      - name: Verify JAR exists
        run: |
          ls -lah target
          test -f "target/${{ env.JAR_FILE }}"

      - name: Build DEB
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/linux/deb
          jpackage \
            --type deb \
            --name "${{ env.APP_NAME }}" \
            --input target \
            --main-jar "${{ env.JAR_FILE }}" \
            --main-class "${{ env.MAIN_CLASS }}" \
            --dest dist/linux/deb \
            --linux-shortcut \
            --vendor "UPB" \
            --app-version "1.0.${{ github.run_number }}"

      - name: Build RPM
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/linux/rpm
          jpackage \
            --type rpm \
            --name "${{ env.APP_NAME }}" \
            --input target \
            --main-jar "${{ env.JAR_FILE }}" \
            --main-class "${{ env.MAIN_CLASS }}" \
            --dest dist/linux/rpm \
            --linux-shortcut \
            --vendor "UPB" \
            --app-version "1.0.${{ github.run_number }}"

      - name: Prepare Linux release assets
        run: |
          mkdir -p release-assets
          cp dist/linux/deb/*.deb release-assets/ChatP2P-Linux.deb
          cp dist/linux/rpm/*.rpm release-assets/ChatP2P-Linux.rpm

      - name: Upload Linux assets artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: linux-release-assets
          path: release-assets/*
          if-no-files-found: error

  build-windows:
    name: Build Windows installer
    runs-on: windows-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v5
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ env.JAVA_VERSION }}
          cache: maven

      - name: Build JAR
        run: mvn -B clean package

      - name: Verify JAR exists
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Get-ChildItem target
          if (!(Test-Path "target/${{ env.JAR_FILE }}")) {
            Write-Error "No existe target/${{ env.JAR_FILE }}"
            exit 1
          }

      - name: Add WiX to PATH if present
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $wixPaths = @(
            "C:\Program Files (x86)\WiX Toolset v3.14\bin",
            "C:\Program Files (x86)\WiX Toolset v3.11\bin"
          )

          $found = $false
          foreach ($path in $wixPaths) {
            if (Test-Path $path) {
              $path | Out-File -FilePath $env:GITHUB_PATH -Append -Encoding utf8
              Write-Host "WiX encontrado en: $path"
              $found = $true
              break
            }
          }

          if (-not $found) {
            Write-Error "WiX no fue encontrado"
            exit 1
          }

      - name: Build Windows EXE installer
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist/windows | Out-Null
          jpackage `
            --type exe `
            --name "${{ env.APP_NAME }}" `
            --input target `
            --main-jar "${{ env.JAR_FILE }}" `
            --main-class "${{ env.MAIN_CLASS }}" `
            --dest dist/windows `
            --vendor "UPB" `
            --app-version "1.0.${{ github.run_number }}" `
            --win-menu `
            --win-shortcut `
            --win-dir-chooser `
            --win-per-user-install

      - name: Prepare Windows release asset
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path release-assets | Out-Null
          $exe = Get-ChildItem dist/windows/*.exe | Select-Object -First 1
          Copy-Item $exe.FullName "release-assets/ChatP2P-Windows-Setup.exe"

      - name: Upload Windows assets artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: windows-release-assets
          path: release-assets/*
          if-no-files-found: error

  update-release:
    name: Update latest-main release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build-linux, build-windows]

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Download Linux assets
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: linux-release-assets
          path: release-assets

      - name: Download Windows assets
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: windows-release-assets
          path: release-assets

      - name: Show release assets
        run: ls -lah release-assets

      - name: Configure git
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"

      - name: Move latest-main tag to current commit
        run: |
          git tag -f "${{ env.RELEASE_TAG }}" "${GITHUB_SHA}"
          git push origin "refs/tags/${{ env.RELEASE_TAG }}" --force

      - name: Create release if missing
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
        run: |
          if gh release view "${{ env.RELEASE_TAG }}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "Release already exists"
          else
            gh release create "${{ env.RELEASE_TAG }}" \
              --title "ChatP2P Latest Main" \
              --notes "Build automática actualizada desde main." \
              --latest=false
          fi

      - name: Update release title and notes
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
        run: |
          gh release edit "${{ env.RELEASE_TAG }}" \
            --title "ChatP2P Latest Main" \
            --notes "Build automática desde main

            Commit: ${GITHUB_SHA}
            Run: #${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"

      - name: Upload / replace release assets
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
        run: |
          gh release upload "${{ env.RELEASE_TAG }}" \
            ./release-assets/ChatP2P-Windows-Setup.exe#Windows\ Installer \
            ./release-assets/ChatP2P-Linux.deb#Linux\ DEB \
            ./release-assets/ChatP2P-Linux.rpm#Linux\ RPM \
            --clobber
